summary: 2 film announcements, 3 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Crack'd
film.announcement: Lauren McQueen to lead Michael J. Long's British psychological drama.

film.title: Echoes
film.talent: Ashley Walters, Nathalie Emmanuel, Emmett J. Scanlan, Leo Gregory
film.announcement: Ashley Walters, Nathalie Emmanuel, Emmett J. Scanlan and Leo Gregory join Alex Lanipekun's short film.

tv.title: Paris & Pups
tv.announcement: Paris Hilton's animated series set for UK's Sky Kids.

tv.title: A Pressing Engagement
tv.talent: Rhea Norwood, Corey Mylchreest, Hannah Waddingham, Richard Ayoade, Vivian Oparah, Bessie Carter
tv.announcement: Jilly Cooper Audible Original cast announced with Rhea Norwood, Corey Mylchreest, Hannah Waddingham, Richard Ayoade, Vivian Oparah and Bessie Carter.

tv.title: The Tatas
tv.announcement: Team from 'Made in India: A Titan Story' reunites for 'The Tatas,' a saga about the prominent Indian business family.
